theme_and_archetype.archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Linear/Notion Minimalist SaaS Vibe

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter for headings.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Cardless UI, subtle borders, extremely generous whitespace.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B 'Control Room Grid' for KPIs (col-span-1), single column list for main data.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 width, sticky positioning, light gray (#F7F7F8) background, no right border or very subtle 1px border.

components.buttons: Flat, pure black background for primary, white text. Secondary buttons are white with 1px zinc-200 border. No drop shadows anywhere.
components.inputs: Minimalist. 1px solid border, subtle black focus ring (ring-zinc-950).
components.tables_and_lists: Linear-style lists. Avoid full grid tables. Use clean rows separated by subtle border-b (border-zinc-200), no vertical lines.
components.badges: Small, rounded-full, flat background colors corresponding to status.

media.description: Minimalist clean desk workspace to be used on the right side of the split-screen auth pages.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: MANDATORY. Every interactive element (button, input, form, link, badge) MUST have a role-based kebab-case data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use simple opacity/transform transitions, duration 200ms.

pages.auth: Split screen layout. Form vertically and horizontally centered on the left half with massive whitespace. Image on the right half.
pages.dashboard: Minimalist top bar. 3 KPI summary widgets in a horizontal row (Total, Pending, Signed). Below, a 'Recent Activity' list (not a heavy table, just a clean list).
pages.document_list: Top action bar with title and 'Upload Document' primary button. Below, a clean Linear-style list of documents displaying Name, Upload Date, and Status Badge.
pages.document_details: Two-column bento layout. Left (col-span-8): Large PDF preview area with light gray background. Right (col-span-4): Document metadata, Signature Request form (Signer Name, Email), and a section to copy the shareable link. Use 'Control Room' tight spacing within the right panel.
pages.public_signing_page: Standalone centered layout. Minimal header with brand. Main content: Document preview with clear instructions. A prominent interactive Signature Pad component (using react-signature-canvas) with 'Clear' and 'Submit Signature' buttons. Keep it ultra-clean to build trust.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the frontend in React using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components. Strip default shadcn shadows to fit the flat, minimalist Linear vibe.
Implement the backend in FastAPI with MongoDB and local file storage for PDFs.
Ensure JWT authentication protects all dashboard routes.
Use react-signature-canvas (or similar) for the drawing functionality on the public signing page.
Implement backend PDF manipulation using a library like PyMuPDF (fitz) or PyPDF2/reportlab to actually embed the base64 signature image at the bottom of the last page of the PDF upon finalization.
Add data-testid to EVERYTHING interactive for testing purposes.
